mapper.sql: id, mcp_id, mcp_name, transport_type, transport_config, request_timeout, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_client_tool_mcp (mcp_id, mcp_name, transport_type, transport_config, request_timeout, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{mcpId}, #{mcpName}, #{transportType}, #{transportConfig}, #{requestTimeout}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_client_tool_mcp SET mcp_id = #{mcpId}, mcp_name = #{mcpName}, transport_type = #{transportType}, transport_config = #{transportConfig}, request_timeout = #{requestTimeout}, status = #{status}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_client_tool_mcp ORDER BY id DESC
